summary: A Fox News 'My View with Lara Trump' segment in which Lara Trump tours the ICE/Secret Service joint command center for the UN General Assembly, interviewing Director Lyons and a Secret Service official about monitoring and protection. It is a TV news walk-and-talk segment, not a produced, music-driven youth-appeal piece.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; 'MY VIEW WITH LARA TRUMP'; 'CURRAN & LYONS HIGHLIGHT JOINT SECURITY CENTER'; 'LARA TOURS JOINT AGENCY COMMAND CENTER IN NY'; 'DIRECTOR LYONS ON SUPPORTING USSS FOR UNGA'
